name: 逻辑错误固化率 Logic Error Persistence
desc: 2 of 4 logic errors persisted past summary boundary (steps 95 / 132).

steps.t: Step 12: wrong path — `source /workspace/conda/bin/activate ...` → `bash: /workspace/conda/bin/activate: No such file or directory`
Step 49: wrong approach — `git clone https://modelscope.cn/datasets/ltrciiith/bhashik-parallel-corpora-health` → 'project ... could not be found or you don't have permission'
Step 51: corrected — pivots to `web_search` for English-Tamil medical parallel corpora
Step 14: wrong flag — `python -c 'import datasets...'` with `wait_for_completion=True` killed at 13.26s (>10s cap)
Step 121 (post-summary-95): identical bug recurs — `python -c 'import torch; ...cuda...'` on `gpu_setup` killed at 13.84s with same `wait_for_completion` mode
Step 134 (post-summary-132): same command re-issued verbatim, same timeout error returned
Step 154 (post-summary-132): missing dir — `cd /workspace/data/outputs && ls -la` → `bash: cd: /workspace/data/outputs: No such file or directory` (output dir never pre-created)
Pre-summary errors: 4 (Steps 12, 14, 49, 154-class) | Post-summary persisted: 2 (wait_for_completion timeout @121/134; missing-output-dir @154)
